title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, discuss their Series A fundraising of $108M and their strategy of rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy systems. They emphasize pursuing ambitious versions of ideas and highlight how regulatory challenges and time investment create sustainable competitive moats.
